heading: Status conference
label: 1188 Status conference
notes: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2019 Amendment note under .Aug. 23, 2019section 5 of Pub. L. 116–54section 101 of this title

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), not later than 60 days after the entry of the order for relief under this chapter, the court shall hold a status conference to further the expeditious and economical resolution of a case under this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Exception
children.label: b .—Exception
children.text: The court may extend the period of time for holding a status conference under subsection (a) if the need for an extension is attributable to circumstances for which the debtor should not justly be held accountable.

children.heading: .—Report
children.label: c .—Report
children.text: Not later than 14 days before the date of the status conference under subsection (a), the debtor shall file with the court and serve on the trustee and all parties in interest a report that details the efforts the debtor has undertaken and will undertake to attain a consensual plan of reorganization.
